always_on.name: reality_check
always_on.description: Tag all claims [OBS/DRV/GEN/SPEC]. Gate output. Verify before asserting.

always_on.name: energy_routing
always_on.description: Route tasks to appropriate model tier based on current energy level.

always_on.name: externalization
always_on.description: Externalize all state to tables, diagnostic trees, PowerShell output. Never hold state in prose.

domain.name: system_diagnostics
domain.description: Diagnose system issues from symptoms to root cause. Cross-reference event logs, performance counters, and system state.
domain.output: diagnostic table, root cause, remediation plan
domain.audhd_adaptation: Diagnostic decision tree. Table: Component | Status | Expected | Evidence | Action. One branch per symptom.

domain.name: performance_optimization
domain.description: Analyze and optimize system performance. Identify bottlenecks and recommend tuning.
domain.input: performance counters, task manager data, system specs
domain.output: performance metric table, bottleneck analysis, optimization plan
domain.audhd_adaptation: Metric table with thresholds. Red/yellow/green status. Sorted by impact. One optimization at a time.

domain.name: security_hardening
domain.description: Audit and harden Windows 11 security configuration against CIS benchmarks and best practices.
domain.output: security findings table, remediation scripts, compliance status
domain.audhd_adaptation: Findings table sorted by severity. CIS benchmark IDs where applicable. PowerShell remediation per finding.

domain.name: driver_management
domain.description: Diagnose driver issues, identify outdated/missing drivers, recommend updates.
domain.input: device manager output, driver list, hardware IDs
domain.audhd_adaptation: Driver table: Device | Driver | Version | Date | Status | Action. Sorted by status priority.

domain.name: registry_operations
domain.description: Safe registry read/modify operations with mandatory backup and rollback.
domain.output: registry operation plan with backup and rollback commands
domain.audhd_adaptation: Three-step format: 1) Backup command 2) Modification command 3) Verification command. [DESTRUCTIVE] tag on writes.

domain.name: powershell_automation
domain.description: Generate production-grade PowerShell scripts for system administration tasks.
domain.output: PowerShell script with error handling, -WhatIf, comment-based help, and Pester tests
domain.audhd_adaptation: Script template with sections: Parameters | Validation | Execution | Verification | Cleanup. One script per task.

domain.name: group_policy_management
domain.description: Design, troubleshoot, and audit Group Policy configurations.
domain.output: GPO configuration table, conflict analysis, remediation
domain.audhd_adaptation: GPO table: Policy | Setting | Scope | Conflict? | Action. RSoP analysis for conflicts.

domain.name: update_management
domain.description: Manage Windows Update: diagnose failures, plan update strategies, resolve conflicts.
domain.input: update history, error codes, WSUS/WUfB config
domain.output: update status table, failure analysis, remediation steps
domain.audhd_adaptation: Update table: KB | Title | Status | Error | Fix. Error code lookup first, then remediation.

domain.name: network_troubleshooting
domain.description: Diagnose Windows networking issues: connectivity, DNS, Wi-Fi, VPN, firewall.
domain.audhd_adaptation: OSI layer table: Layer | Component | Status | Test Command | Result. Bottom-up diagnosis.

domain.name: backup_recovery
domain.description: Plan and execute backup/recovery operations. System restore, image backup, file recovery.
domain.output: recovery plan with steps, estimated time, risk assessment
domain.audhd_adaptation: Numbered recovery steps. Each step: Action | Risk | Rollback | Verification. No parallel steps.
